creator: dbn@FreeBSD.org
text:
The documentation for the fields description, as linked on any bugs "Fields" link (see https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/page.cgi?id=fields.html#bug_status) does not match what is available.  

The bug page shows "New", "Open", "In-Progress" and "Closed".  However, the documentation does not appear to be tracking the bug workflow correctly.
